name: Chocolate Chili- Southern
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the meat until it turns gray but not browned, about 20 minutes. Set aside.
2. Heat oil in the same skillet and cook the onions until soft and translucent, 10 to 20 minutes.
3. Stir the reserved meat into the onions. Add the tomato juice (or stewed tomatoes), 2 cups water, chili powder, cumin, oregano, cocoa, cinnamon, and salt. Blend and turn the heat up to high to bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Taste for seasoning. Add more chili powder if desired. Cook an additional 30 minutes longer.
5. Stir in garlic and masa harina. Cook beans if desired and add to each plate.
